task_description: find the top 5 most starred Python repositories on GitHub
code:
echo "Fetching top 5 most starred Python repositories from GitHub without jq..."
curl -s "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=language:python&sort=stars&order=desc" | grep -oP '(?<="name":")[^"]+' | head -n 5

trace.stdout: Fetching top 5 most starred Python repositories from GitHub without jq...

messages.content:
```bash
echo "jq is not installed. Attempting to install jq..."
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq
```
